name: The Back Nine Golf | Pompton Plains, NJ
about: The Back Nine Golf in Pompton Plains, NJ, is a golf simulator venue that offers a high-tech practice and play environment. The venue features multiple bays equipped with advanced simulation technology, providing a realistic golfing experience for players of all skill levels. Pricing is based on bay rental, with options available for individual and group sessions. The facility is designed for golfers seeking a convenient and immersive indoor golf experience, suitable for practice, leisure, and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic gameplay
Multiple bays available for solo or group sessions
Convenient indoor environment for year-round practice
Flexible pricing options for various budgets
Suitable for both casual play and serious skill development

food_and_drink.notes: Food options available on-site or through catering
Full bar service with various beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are encouraged to bring their own clubs for the most accurate simulation experience. Club rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full bar and food service to all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulation typically takes 60-90 minutes per player, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and offers a kid-friendly environment with appropriate programs and amenities for junior golfers.
